security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; font-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Threshold FROST signing companion for Zcash
bundle.longDescription: Cyze is a desktop companion for FROST threshold signing of Zcash Orchard transactions. A group holds a shared key split across members; a threshold must cooperate to sign, with no single member able to spend alone.
